intro_highlights.text: In the recent literature on machine learning and decision making, calibration has emerged as a desirable and widely-studied statistical property.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 在机器学习与决策系统中，校准已从“可选指标”变成“核心统计属性”。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In recent literature on <field>, <property> has emerged as a desirable and widely studied objective.

intro_highlights.text: We define calibration testing from samples: given draws from a distribution, we distinguish perfectly calibrated models from those ε-far from calibration.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 我们把问题收敛为一个清晰判别任务：有限样本下区分“完美校准”和“偏离校准”。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: Given <sample setting>, our goal is to distinguish <ideal case> from <epsilon-far case>.

intro_highlights.text: We reformulate the empirical smooth calibration linear program as a minimum-cost flow on a structured graph and solve it in near-linear time.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 关键动作是把原问题重写成结构化最小费用流，从而拿到近线性复杂度。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: We reformulate <original optimization> as <structured problem>, enabling a near-linear-time solver.

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 先讲校准在预测决策中的中心地位。
定义 distribution-level calibration testing。
指出现有度量和黑盒求解器效率问题。
LP到min-cost flow重写，并给复杂度优势。
待缓存抓取后补齐。

intro_highlights.text: A key and open challenge for grounding MLLMs in actions is the gap between natural language and embodiment-specific action spaces.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 核心痛点不是模型能力不足，而是语言空间与动作空间天然错配。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: A key open challenge is the mismatch between <native model space> and <target action space>.

intro_highlights.text: There has not been a systematic study that compares continuous and discrete action grounding strategies across diverse embodiments.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句把“研究空白”说得非常具体：缺系统性、缺跨设置比较。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: To date, there has been no systematic study across <settings> and <strategy families>.

intro_highlights.text: For continuous actions, learned tokenization at multiple resolutions works best; for discrete actions, semantic alignment to model vocabulary is most effective.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 同一句里完成了“分场景规律总结”，是很强的引言收束句。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: For <setting A>, <design A> performs best; for <setting B>, <design B> is more effective.

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 先肯定 MLLM 能力边界。
自然语言与动作空间错配。
按连续/离散动作分策略并给系统实验。

intro_highlights.text: To harness the strengths of both paradigms, we introduce FlowLLM.
intro_highlights.why_good: 桥接式表达，适合混合范式论文。

intro_highlights.text: This synergistic approach bridges discrete and continuous modeling.
intro_highlights.why_good: 总结句可直接复用到方法贡献段。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: LLM离散优势 + RFM连续优势形成互补。
待缓存抓取后补齐。

intro_highlights.text: Existing methods typically obtain global correspondences first and then cluster to infer instance-level poses, which is brittle in cluttered scenes.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 先总结主流范式，再点出脆弱性，逻辑很完整。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: Most existing methods follow <pipeline>, but this becomes brittle under <failure condition>.

intro_highlights.text: To address this, we propose a focusing-and-matching pipeline that first localizes object centers and then performs instance-level matching.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: “to address this”后的方案句给了清晰两阶段结构。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: To address this issue, we propose a <two-stage pipeline>: first <stage1>, then <stage2>.

intro_highlights.text: The decomposition from one-to-many registration to multiple one-to-one registrations improves robustness and offers a transferable design principle.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 不只报方法，还给出可迁移原则，这类句子非常值得复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: Our decomposition from <hard global task> to <multiple local tasks> yields both robustness and transferability.

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 先按pipeline类型分组。
先focus再matching。

intro_highlights.text: It is natural to ask: what is the optimal strategy in repeated interactions?
intro_highlights.why_good: 问题驱动型引言中的“核心问题句”。

intro_highlights.text: Can such an optimal strategy be computed efficiently?
intro_highlights.why_good: 将研究问题自然转化为可计算性问题。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 多智能体现实场景引出最优策略问题。
正结果与负结果并行陈述。

intro_highlights.text: Hopfield network of associative memory is an elegant mathematical model.
intro_highlights.why_good: 经典工作定位句，语义紧凑。

intro_highlights.text: Adding new memories does not change the size of the memory tensor.
intro_highlights.why_good: 亮点句直接传达方法价值。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 指出新增模式导致参数增长。
随机特征替代表达保持参数规模。

intro_highlights.text: A referring expression must be sufficiently detailed to identify the target while remaining correct enough to avoid hallucinated attributes.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 这句同时定义了目标与约束，非常适合引言第二段。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: A successful <output> must be detailed enough to <goal A> while remaining accurate enough to avoid <failure B>.

intro_highlights.text: We observe a systematic trade-off between detailedness and correctness in MLLM-based referring expression generation.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 把经验现象提升为“系统性冲突”，研究动机立刻成立。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: We observe a systematic trade-off between <quality A> and <quality B> in <task>.

intro_highlights.text: To address this issue, we propose a training-free framework that elicits intermediate-layer signals and suppresses hallucination during decoding.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 方案句含“机制+效果方向”，非常适合模板化复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: We propose a training-free framework that <elicits signal> and <suppresses failure mode> during decoding.

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 细节充分性与正确性冲突。
unleash-then-eliminate + probing降算力。

intro_highlights.text: Can we equip AI models with spatial intelligence comparable to humans who naturally build topological cognitive maps?
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 以问题句开场，直接建立研究愿景与认知类比。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: Can we equip AI systems with <human-like capability> for <target reasoning task>?

intro_highlights.text: We propose the task of building a Multiview Scene Graph from unposed images, with interconnected place and object nodes.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 任务定义句信息完整：输入、输出、结构特征一次说清。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: We propose the task of constructing <structured output> from <input condition>.

intro_highlights.text: To facilitate this task, we curate a dataset and design evaluation metrics that directly measure graph quality.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 任务论文中的标准贡献句：任务 + 数据 + 指标三件套。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: To facilitate this task, we curate <dataset> and design <metrics> that directly evaluate <core quality>.

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 认知地图类比切入。
数据集 + 指标 + baseline。
